message.content:
@startuml
participant "Organization Employee" as Employee

interface :CreateTaskUI

interface :CreateTaskController

interface ApplicationPOT

interface :Platform

interface org :Organization

interface cat :Category

interface Ic :List<Category>

participant "task :Task" as Task

participant "cat :Category" as Category

participant "Ic :List<Category>" as Ic

Employee -> :CreateTaskUI :asks to create a new task
:CreateTaskUI -> Employee :requests data (reference, designation, informal description, technical description, duration, cost)
:CreateTaskUI -> Employee :3 types requested data
:CreateTaskUI -> :CreateTaskController :Ic=getTaskCategories()
:CreateTaskController -> :Platform :Ic=getTaskCategories()
:Platform -> :Category :Ic=getTaskCategories()
:CreateTaskUI -> :CreateTaskController :6 shows task categories list and ask to select one
:CreateTaskController -> :Category :cat=getCategoryById(categoryId)
:CreateTaskController -> :org :org=getOrganizationByUserEmail(email)
:org -> :Task :create(ref.designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,cat)
:Task -> :org :validateTask(task)
:org -> :CreateTaskController :17 result
:CreateTaskController -> :org :19 confirms the data
:org -> :CreateTaskController :20 saveTask()
:CreateTaskController -> :org :21 saveTask(task)
:org -> :org :22 validateTask(task)
:org -> :org :23 addTask(task)
:org -> :CreateTaskController :24 result
:CreateTaskController -> :Employee :25 informs operation success

@enduml
